CONTRACT_TYPE_IMMUTABLE: The contract type cannot be changed.
DELETE_REQUIRES_CANCELED: Only contracts in CANCELED status can be deleted.
VEHICLE_ID_AND_DATA_CONFLICT: vehicleId and vehicleData cannot be sent at the same time.
VEHICLE_REQUIRED_FOR_PURCHASE: vehicleId or vehicleData is required for a purchase contract.
VEHICLE_DATA_NOT_APPLICABLE_FOR_SALE: vehicleData does not apply to a sale contract.
VEHICLE_ID_REQUIRED_FOR_SALE: vehicleId is required for a sale contract.
VEHICLE_PURCHASE_PRICE_MUST_BE_POSITIVE: The vehicle purchase price must be greater than zero.
CONFLICTING_PURCHASE_EXISTS: A pending or active purchase already exists for this vehicle.
PURCHASE_PRICE_MUST_BE_POSITIVE: The purchase price must be greater than zero.
NO_VALID_PURCHASE_FOR_SALE: There is no active or completed purchase for this vehicle.
SALE_PRICE_MUST_BE_POSITIVE: The sale price must be greater than zero.
CONFLICTING_SALE_EXISTS: A pending, active or completed sale already exists for this vehicle.
